request.prompt:
Determine whether N.Flying has any publicly announced events after 2026-07-15 (concerts, tours, or fan meetings). Search for this artist only; do not bundle another artist.

Strict evidence rules: accept only an official artist/company source, promoter, venue, ticketing source, or reliable media. Exclude kpopofficial.com and all other event aggregators as evidence. Do not guess. A general tour announcement without a dated stop is not an event. If no qualifying public event is found, return NO_EVENTS_FOUND.

For every event you claim, the artist must match and you must provide the complete exact date or date range, venue, city/country, and a structured web-search citation with URL, title, and cited text that directly supports that same event. Do not claim an event without a citation.

Return only these fields in this order:
VERDICT: EVENTS_FOUND | NO_EVENTS_FOUND
EVENT_COUNT: <n>
EVENTS:
- ARTIST: ...
  DATES: ...
  VENUE: ...
  CITY_COUNTRY: ...
  SOURCE_CLASS: official_artist_company | promoter | venue | ticketing | reliable_media
  CITATION_URL: ...
  CITED_TEXT: ...
REASON: one short factual sentence

content.text: I'll search for N.Flying upcoming events systematically across multiple source types.

content.text: Now let me search specifically for any N.Flying events **after** July 15, 2026.

content.title: N.Flying Concerts & Live Tour Dates: 2026-2027 Tickets | Bandsintown
N.Flying - 2026 Tour Dates & Concert Schedule
N.Flying Tickets & 2026 Concert Tour Dates
N.Flying Concert Tickets - 2026 Tour Dates.

content.text:
Here is the full assessment:

---

**Evidence review against the cutoff date of 2026-07-15:**

All confirmed N.Flying events found in the search results fall **before** July 15, 2026:

- **Seoul Fan Meeting** (March 21–22, 2026) — already completed per tenasia.com recap.
- **Taipei Fan Concert** (April 11–12, 2026) — already past.
- **Macau Fan Concert** (May 9, 2026) — already past.

For events **after** July 15, 2026:
-

citations.cited_text: We're sorry, but we couldn't find any upcoming concerts for N.Flying.
citations.title: N.Flying Tickets, 2026 Concert Tour Dates | Ticketmaster

content.text: Ticketmaster states: "We're sorry, but we couldn't find any upcoming concerts for N.Flying."
Live Nation similarly shows: "There are no upcoming shows."

citations.cited_text: Unfortunately there are no concert dates for N.Flying scheduled in 2026.
citations.title: N.Flying Full Tour Schedule 2026 & 2027, Tour Dates & Concerts – Songkick

content.text: Songkick reports: "Unfortunately there are no concert dates for N.Flying scheduled in 2026."

No official artist/company source (FNC Entertainment), promoter, venue, or reliable media source surfaced any N.Flying event with a confirmed date after July 15, 2026. The `nflyingtour.com` site explicitly self-identifies as an independent, non-affiliated fan guide and is therefore excluded per the evidence rules.

---

**VERDICT:** NO_EVENTS_FOUND

**EVENT_COUNT:** 0

**EVENTS:** *(none)*

**REASON:** As of July 15, 2026, no qualifying source — official artist/company, promoter, venue, ticketing platform, or reliable media — has announced any N.Flying concert, tour stop, or fan meeting with a confirmed date after July 15, 2026; Ticketmaster, Live Nation, and Songkick all explicitly confirm no upcoming N.Flying events.
